moments.title: The Open at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship is held at Royal Birkdale from 16 to 19 July 2026

angles.name: Golf's biggest stage
angles.copy: The world's best golfers head to Royal Birkdale for The Open

angles.name: Royal Birkdale's challenge
angles.copy: Can anyone tame the links at Royal Birkdale and claim the Claret Jug?

angles.name: British golfing hopes
angles.copy: Who will lead the charge for British golf at The Open?

moments.title: Glasgow Commonwealth Games
moments.blurb: The Commonwealth Games come to Glasgow from 23 July to 2 August 2026

angles.name: Glasgow's big moment
angles.copy: Glasgow is ready to host the Commonwealth Games and show the world what it's got

angles.name: Scotland's medal hopes
angles.copy: Which Scottish athletes will be going for gold at the Glasgow Commonwealth Games?

angles.name: The Games' impact on Glasgow
angles.copy: How will the Commonwealth Games benefit the city of Glasgow and its people?

moments.title: Royal Welsh Show
moments.blurb: The Royal Welsh Show runs from 20 to 23 July 2026 at Llanelwedd, Builth Wells

angles.name: Agricultural showcase
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is the biggest agricultural show in Europe, with something for everyone

angles.name: Welsh farming's best
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show celebrates the best of Welsh farming and rural life

angles.name: Family fun in Builth Wells
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a great day out for all the family, with plenty to see and do

moments.title: National Eisteddfod of Wales
moments.blurb: The National Eisteddfod comes to North Pembrokeshire from 1 to 8 August 2026

angles.name: Wales' cultural celebration
angles.copy: The National Eisteddfod of Wales is a celebration of language, music, and culture

angles.name: Pembrokeshire's big event
angles.copy: The National Eisteddfod of Wales is coming to North Pembrokeshire, with plenty to see and do

angles.name: Welsh talent on show
angles.copy: The National Eisteddfod of Wales showcases the best of Welsh talent, from music to poetry

moments.title: Sidmouth Folk Festival
moments.blurb: The 72nd Sidmouth Folk Festival takes over the Devon seaside town from 31 July to 7 August 2026

angles.name: Folk music by the sea
angles.copy: The Sidmouth Folk Festival brings the best of folk music to the Devon coast

angles.name: Devon's folk extravaganza
angles.copy: The Sidmouth Folk Festival is a week-long celebration of folk music and dance in Devon

angles.name: Something for everyone
angles.copy: From traditional folk to contemporary acts, the Sidmouth Folk Festival has something for all music lovers
